2605.27879.title: Towards Faithful Agentic XAI: A Verification Method and an Open-World Benchmark for Better Model Faithfulness
2605.27879.paper_summary: Explainable AI (XAI) helps users interpret model behavior and identify potential faults. Agentic XAI systems use Large Language Models (LLMs) to make explanations more accessible through natural-language interaction, but they can also produce plausible yet unfaithful explanations. This risk arises because unreliable XAI outputs for complex models can be amplified by LLMs and mislead users. We propose Faithful Agentic XAI (FAX), a framework that improves explanation faithfulness through explicit verification. FAX decomposes draft explanations into claims and cross-checks them against inherently faithful tools, filtering unsupported or contradictory claims before final generation. We also introduce CRAFTER-XAI-Bench, an open-world reinforcement learning benchmark with complex policies, diverse goals, and challenging scenarios for assessing model-specific faithfulness. On CRAFTER-XAI-Bench, FAX improves simulation faithfulness from 0.20 for the strongest baseline to 0.46 while maintaining high informativeness, relevance, and fluency. On three tabular benchmarks, FAX performs competitively with prior Agentic XAI baselines, but our analysis shows that these settings can conflate task accuracy with model-specific faithfulness. These findings show that explicit verification is essential for faithful Agentic XAI and that that faithfulness benchmarks must be designed to test explanations against the behavior of the target model itself.
2605.27879.paper_summary_zh: 可解釋的人工智慧（XAI）幫助用戶解釋模型行為並識別潛在的缺陷。代理型 XAI 系統使用大型語言模型（LLMs）通過自然語言互動使解釋更易於理解，但它們也可能產生看似合理但不真實的解釋。這種風險的產生是因為對於複雜模型的不可靠 XAI 輸出可能會被 LLM 放大，從而誤導用戶。我們提出了忠實代理型 XAI（FAX），這是一個通過明確驗證來提高解釋忠實性的框架。FAX 將草擬的解釋分解為主張，並將其與本質上忠實的工具進行交叉檢查，在最終生成之前過濾掉不支持或矛盾的主張。我們還介紹了 CRAFTER-XAI-Bench，這是一個開放世界的強化學習基準，具有複雜的策略、多樣的目標和挑戰性的場景，用於評估模型特定的忠實性。在 CRAFTER-XAI-Bench 上，FAX 將模擬忠實性從最強基準的 0.20 提升至 0.46，同時保持高信息性、相關性和流暢性。在三個表格基準上，FAX 的表現與之前的代理型 XAI 基準相當，但我們的分析顯示這些設置可能會將任務準確性與模型特定的忠實性混淆。這些發現表明，明確驗證對於忠實的代理型 XAI 至關重要，並且忠實性基準必須設計用於測試解釋與目標模型本身的行為。
2605.27879.author: Jaechang Kim et.al.
2605.27879.authors: Jaechang Kim, Sunung Mun, Seungjoon Lee, Jaewoong Cho, Jungseul Ok
